---
title: Towards automatic sizing for PPE with a point cloud based variational autoencoder
date: '2021-01-01'
author: [Jake Searcy, Susan L Sokolowski]
publication: arXiv preprint arXiv:2105.10067 (2021).
categories: [health]
url_source: ''
url_preprint: 'https://arxiv.org/abs/2105.10067'
journ: arXiv preprint arXiv:2105.10067
issue: null
page: ''
year: 2021
image: ''
pub_number: 3
---
